__schema1.description: A string that uniquely identifies a calendar. You can get information for multiple calendars by using a comma-separated list of ids or a wildcard expression. You can get information for all calendars by using `_all` or `*` or by omitting the calendar identifier.

__schema3.description: Skips the specified number of calendars. This parameter is supported only when you omit the calendar identifier.

__schema5.description: Specifies the maximum number of calendars to obtain. This parameter is supported only when you omit the calendar identifier.

__schema7.description: This object is supported only when you omit the calendar identifier.

__schema8.description: Skips the specified number of items.

__schema9.description: Specifies the maximum number of items to obtain.
